metadata.name: developer-workflow-retrieval-v1
metadata.description: Anonymized failures from real never-again development sessions and repo-encoded regression cases.
metadata.case_policy: Every failure must cite provenance. Queries should paraphrase how an agent or developer would ask after seeing the failure.

failures.solution: Use the project Python 3.12 virtualenv and install the declared runtime dependencies before running MCP tests.
failures.context: pytest collected tests/test_mcp.py from the wrong interpreter environment

failures.solution: Run tests with the project virtualenv or install the base package dependencies before importing the SQLite store.
failures.context: pytest collected tests/test_store_floor.py outside the project environment

source.note: Sandbox blocked uv cache access outside the workspace.

failures.error: error: Failed to initialize cache at ~/.cache/uv; Operation not permitted
failures.solution: Use an existing in-repo virtualenv, set UV_CACHE_DIR to a writable path, or request permission before running uv.

source.note: The local venv had test dependencies but not the lint tool.

failures.solution: Install Ruff in the active development environment before running the lint command.

source.note: Global git config required commit signing, but GPG could not write to the home directory.

failures.error: gpg failed to sign the data; failed to create temporary file ~/.gnupg; Operation not permitted
failures.solution: Disable commit signing in throwaway test repositories with git config commit.gpgsign false.
failures.context: pytest fixture creating git commits in a sandbox

source.note: Package data lookup failed because the top-level package was a namespace package.

failures.solution: Add package __init__.py files and load resources from the concrete never_again.evals package.
failures.context: importlib.resources.files used for packaged benchmark data

source.note: Compose file lived under deploy while Dockerfile copied project-root files.

failures.error: Docker build cannot find pyproject.toml or never_again package when building from deploy directory
failures.solution: Set build context to the repository root and Dockerfile to deploy/Dockerfile.

source.note: Deploy config used stale environment variable names.

failures.error: Team server starts with SQLite defaults because DATABASE_URL, EMBED_MODEL, and DEFAULT_TEAM are ignored
failures.solution: Use NEVER_AGAIN_STORE, NEVER_AGAIN_DB, NEVER_AGAIN_EMBEDDER, OLLAMA_EMBED_MODEL, and NEVER_AGAIN_TEAM.

source.note: Client sent relevance floor fields that the server request model ignored.

failures.error: HTTP query relevance floors are silently dropped by the team server
failures.solution: Add cosine_floor and fused_floor to the server query payload and pass them to Engine.query.

source.note: Engine methods defaulted to local team even when settings.team was configured.

failures.error: NEVER_AGAIN_TEAM is ignored by CLI search and log calls
failures.solution: Default Engine.log and Engine.query to settings.team when the caller does not pass a team.

source.note: Schema hardcoded one vector size while supported embedders can emit different dimensions.

failures.solution: Keep the stored vector unconstrained unless one model is chosen, then add a matching expression index and set NEVER_AGAIN_EMBED_DIMENSION.
failures.context: Postgres team search with local fastembed and Ollama embeddings

source.note: Local markdown links had been rewritten to chat URLs.

failures.error: README links point to https://claude.ai/chat/... instead of repository files
failures.solution: Use relative links for repository documents such as .env.example, CONTRIBUTING.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and LICENSE.

queries.text: pytest fails collecting test_mcp because ModuleNotFoundError no module named mcp
